title: LichenRemote.uri_base missing brackets for IPv6 addresses
description:
File: python/src/lichen/coap/transport.py:115-120

The uri_base property constructs URIs without IPv6 bracket notation:
```python
@property
def uri_base(self) -> str:
    return f'coap://{self._host}'
```

For IPv6 addresses like 'fe80::1', this produces 'coap://fe80::1' which is malformed - RFC 3986 requires brackets: 'coap://[fe80::1]'

This causes parse failures when the URI is used with standard URI parsing libraries, and interoperability issues with other CoAP implementations.

Fix: Detect IPv6 addresses and wrap them:
```python
@property
def uri_base(self) -> str:
    if ':' in self._host:  # IPv6
        return f'coap://[{self._host}]'
    return f'coap://{self._host}'
```
close_reason: IPv6 bracket notation already in uri_base/uri_base_local (if ':' in host). Removed comments per no-comments rule. ruff passes. Commit da93d2151.
